element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Used throughout all stages as baseline offense
Dodge enemy attacks and low barriers; first Mega Man game to feature this
Access higher platforms and areas; unlocks new stage sections
Each weapon has specific Robot Master weaknesses; player chooses stage order to optimize
Mini-boss battles that unlock passageways; reveals identity as Proto Man at end
Fly around screens; access previously unreachable areas
Navigate underwater sections; unique stage mechanic
Stored consumables; refill full health when selected
Second phase content; reuse Robot Master abilities from previous Mega Man games
Linear progression; culminates in final confrontation with Dr. Wily

typical_relief_triggers: Opening passageway via Break Man defeat
typical_tension_triggers: Doc Robot encounters in second phase
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear stage selection followed by mandatory second phase with Doc Robots, then linear Wily fortress; difficulty noted as high throughout

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Rush ability transformations unlock new accessible areas within stages and fortress
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Passageways opened by defeating Break Man encounters; weapon weakness system encourages non-linear stage exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Eight selectable Robot Master stages with varying difficulty; player can choose advantageous order via weapon weakness system
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Revisit four mining sites facing Doc Robots possessing previous Mega Man series abilities; intensified enemy patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: Linear Wily fortress with escalating challenges; final Wily confrontation
notable_spikes: Doc Robot phase introduces enemy patterns from previous games
Wily fortress linear sections remove stage selection flexibility
Overall difficulty noted as 'too difficult' in critical reception

notable_level_patterns.description: Eight selectable stages, each culminating in themed Robot Master boss fight. Each stage environment relates to boss weapon theme (Top Man's stage, Shadow Man's stage, etc.)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Top Man's Stage shown with Mega Man using slide ability

notable_level_patterns.description: Mini-boss encounters throughout stages that unlock passageways when defeated, creating progression locks and encouraging thorough exploration
Player completes eight Robot Master stages in any order; optimal sequence determined by weapon weakness vulnerabilities, encouraging strategic planning
Post-eight-master content requires revisiting four mining sites to face Doc Robots; second-phase structure distinct from initial exploration
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Four selected mining worlds, second pass
